text.autoconfig.guiscaler.title: GUI Scaler Configuration
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.enableA: Automatically adjusts GUI scale based on window size
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.mode.@T:
AUTO: Smart scaling based on resolution and pixel density
CUSTOM: Uses custom rules defined below
text.autoconfig.guiscaler.option.customR: Define custom rules: Window Width -> GUI Scale
